channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HEIDELBERG] HeidelbergCement India Ltd: No Transfer Requests Received in February 2026
item.description:
According to the monthly reporting, HeidelbergCement India Ltd did not receive any transfer requests during the month of February 2026. This information was confirmed by M/s. Integrated Registry Management Services Private Limited, the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) of the company. No requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during the month. The average time taken for processing requests was also nil.

  • HeidelbergCement India Ltd did not receive any transfer requests during February 2026.
  • The Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) of the company, M/s. Integrated Registry Management Services Private Limited, confirmed no requests were received.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HEIDELBERGCEMENT INDIA LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [THERMAX] Thermax Ltd Faces Rs 3.14 Cr Penalty from Joint Commissioner CGST, Pune
item.description:
Thermax Ltd has informed the Stock Exchanges about the Assessment order passed by the Joint Commissioner CGST, Pune, Maharashtra. The order, received on March 30, 2026, imposes a penalty of Rs 3.14 Cr on the company. The penalty is due to the disallowance of lower GST rate for goods incorrectly classified under HSN for the period 2019-20 to 2022-23. The company plans to file an appeal challenging the demand.

  • Thermax Ltd received an assessment order from the Joint Commissioner CGST, Pune, Maharashtra on March 30, 2026.
  • The order imposes a penalty of Rs 3.14 Cr on the company.
  • The penalty is due to the disallowance of lower GST rate for goods incorrectly classified under HSN for the period 2019-20 to 2022-23.
  • Thermax Ltd plans to file an appeal challenging the demand.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THERMAX LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [GESHIP] Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Q1 FY2026-2027
item.description:
Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for its Directors and designated employees. The closure will be in effect from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results for the quarter ending as on March 31, 2026. This move is in accordance with the company's internal Code for Prevention of Insider Trading.

  • Trading window closure announced for Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after Q1 FY2026-2027 financial results announcement
  • Move in line with the company's internal Code for Prevention of Insider Trading
  • Applies to Directors and designated employees of the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREAT EASTERN SHIPPING CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [APTECHT] Aptech Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insiders Until After Q4 Results
item.description:
Aptech Ltd, in accordance with SEBI regulations, has announced the closure of the trading window for all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, until the end of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This decision prohibits all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives from trading in the securities of the company during the specified period. The date for the board meeting to consider and declare the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, will be announced separately.

  • Aptech Ltd closes trading window for insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after Q4 results declaration.
  • Trading prohibition in line with SEBI regulations.
  • Date for board meeting to consider and declare results to be announced separately.
  • Aptech Ltd emphasizes compliance with regulatory requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APTECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RMC] RMC Switchgears Ltd. to be Listed on BSE & NSE Mainboards from 1st April, 2026
item.description:
RMC Switchgears Ltd. has received final listing and trading approval for migration of 1,05,76,850 equity shares from the SME Platform of BSE Limited to the Mainboard of BSE Limited and from the SME Platform of BSE Limited to the Capital Market segment (Main Board) of National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). This dual listing marks a significant milestone in the company's journey, aligning with its strategic vision to broaden the shareholder base, improve visibility and accessibility of shares, and reinforce its position in the Indian financial ecosystem. The migration will make the company subject to all provisions of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, including corporate governance provisions.

  • RMC Switchgears Ltd. to be listed on BSE & NSE Mainboards from 1st April, 2026
  • Migration of 1,05,76,850 equity shares from SME Platform to BSE Limited's Mainboard and NSE's Capital Market segment
  • Dual listing to strengthen investor confidence and facilitate greater liquidity
  • Aligned with the company's strategic vision to broaden shareholder base and improve visibility
  • Subject to all provisions of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, including corporate governance provisions on the first date of trading on Main Board

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RMC Switchgears Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DIVISLAB] Divis Laboratories Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window from April 01, 2026
item.description:
Divis Laboratories Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons, Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons and Insiders. The date of the Board meeting for the declaration of the audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Divis Laboratories Ltd announces closure of trading window from April 01, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed till 48 hours after declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026
  • Announcement in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Board meeting date for declaration of audited financial results to be intimated later
  • Decision affects trading by Designated Persons, Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons and Insiders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DIVI'S LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NITINSPIN] Nitin Spinners Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window on NSE Until After Financial Results
item.description:
Nitin Spinners Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited for promoters, designated persons, connected persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will begin on April 1, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results for the quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026. Traders are advised not to trade in the company's shares during this period.

  • Nitin Spinners Ltd. has closed the trading window on the NSE for promoters, designated persons, connected persons, and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will begin on April 1, 2026, and will last until 48 hours after the announcement of financial results for the quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026.
  • Traders are advised not to trade in the company's shares during the closure of the trading window.
  • The reopening of the trading window will be intimated in due course of time after the announcement of the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NITIN SPINNERS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ACSTECH] ACS Technologies Limited Becomes Exclusive India Partner for Tahaluf Al Emarat, Bringing Internationally Recognized AI Innovation to India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACS Technologies Limited, a technology solutions provider serving India’s government, defence, and enterprise sectors, has announced an exclusive strategic partnership with Tahaluf Al Emarat Technical Solutions L.L.C S.P.C. Under this agreement, ACS Technologies becomes Tahaluf’s Exclusive PAN India Reseller, authorized to distribute and implement Tahaluf’s full portfolio of AI and IoT solutions across government, defence, enterprise, and commercial segments. This partnership enables ACS Technologies to introduce internationally recognized AI innovation to India, leveraging Tahaluf’s proven platforms to support smart governance, border and perimeter security, critical infrastructure protection, and digital transformation initiatives. The partnership strengthens ACS’s ability to deliver certified, scalable, and deployment ready AI and IoT systems to large scale national and enterprise programs, positioning itself as a key enabler of India’s smart infrastructure and digital transformation roadmap.

  • ACS Technologies Limited has signed an exclusive agreement with Tahaluf Al Emarat Technical Solutions L.L.C S.P.C for distribution and implementation of AI and IoT solutions in India.
  • This partnership brings internationally recognized AI innovation to India, supporting smart governance, border and perimeter security, critical infrastructure protection, and digital transformation initiatives.
  • ACS Technologies is poised to become a category-defining enterprise for the decade ahead, leading the global shift toward AI-driven infrastructure and intelligent automation.
  • The partnership strengthens ACS’s ability to deliver certified, scalable, and deployment ready AI and IoT systems to large scale national and enterprise programs.
  • ACS Technologies is positioned as a key enabler of India’s smart infrastructure and digital transformation roadmap.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACS Technologies Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [TATACHEM] Tata Chemicals Simplifies UK Operations Holding Structure
item.description:
Tata Chemicals Limited has announced a restructuring of its UK operations holding structure. The company has transferred all assets and investments from Gusiute Holdings (UK) Limited (GHUL) to Homefield Pvt. UK Limited (HFUK) effective March 30, 2026. This move is aimed at rationalising the number of intermediate entities in the holding structure of the Company’s UK operations. Consequently, GHUL has ceased to be a material subsidiary of the Company and HFUK is now considered a material subsidiary. This change will simplify the group holding structure without affecting the ultimate ownership of the Company over its UK holding and operating subsidiaries.

  • Tata Chemicals Limited is simplifying its UK operations holding structure.
  • The company is transferring all assets and investments from Gusiute Holdings (UK) Limited (GHUL) to Homefield Pvt. UK Limited (HFUK) effective March 30, 2026.
  • This move will rationalise the number of intermediate entities in the holding structure of the Company’s UK operations.
  • GHUL has ceased to be a material subsidiary of the Company and HFUK is now considered a material subsidiary.
  • This change will simplify the group holding structure without affecting the ultimate ownership of the Company over its UK holding and operating subsidiaries.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CENTRALBK] Central Bank of India Receives Demand Notice of Rs. 296.08 Crores from Income Tax Department
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Central Bank of India has received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department under Section 143(3) read with Section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961. The notice, dated 28.03.2026, advises the Bank to pay an amount of Rs. 296.08 Crores as tax liability for the Assessment Year 2024-25. The Bank is challenging the order in the appropriate forum, stating that it has adequate factual and legal grounds to dispute the disallowances and additions made in the order. The Bank believes that the entire demand will subside, and therefore, expects no impact on its financial, operational, or other activities.

  • Central Bank of India received a demand notice from the Income Tax Department for Rs. 296.08 Crores
  • The demand is for the Assessment Year 2024-25 under Section 143(3) and Section 144B of the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • The Bank is challenging the order in the appropriate forum
  • The Bank believes it has adequate factual and legal grounds to dispute the disallowances and additions made in the order
  • The Bank expects no impact on its financial, operational, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTRAL BANK OF INDIA | Category: Legal
